author: NoiselessVolatileLobster
name: VCText
short: Ping a specified role when the first person joins a configured Voice Channel.
description: Monitors specified voice channels. When the first person joins an empty configured voice channel, it will post a custom message and ping a designated role in a specific text channel. Includes interactive Component v2 setup forms.
end_user_data_statement: This cog does not persistently store data or PII about end users.
install_msg: Thanks for installing VCText! Use `[p]vctextset` to begin configuring your voice and text channels.
